entities.name: UZBEKISTAN
entities.description: A country in Central Asia, formerly part of the USSR and currently a member of the Commonwealth of Independent States

entities.name: USSR
entities.description: The Union of Soviet Socialist Republics, a former sovereign state

entities.name: COMMONWEALTH OF INDEPENDENT STATES
entities.description: A regional intergovernmental organization comprising former Soviet republics

entities.name: CENTRAL ASIA
entities.description: The inland region of Asia where Uzbekistan is located

entities.name: COTTON
entities.description: A major agricultural crop grown in Uzbekistan

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A major agricultural crop grown in Uzbekistan

entities.name: CORN
entities.description: A major agricultural crop grown in Uzbekistan

entities.name: SHEEP
entities.description: An animal species bred for agricultural purposes in Uzbekistan

entities.name: SILK REARING
entities.description: The process of raising silkworms to produce silk, an important activity in Uzbekistan

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop grown in Uzbekistan known for being drought-resistant and high in protein

entities.name: DROUGHT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to survive and grow in conditions with limited water

entities.name: HIGH PROTEIN
entities.description: A nutritional trait characterized by a high concentration of protein

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: The amount of precipitation that influences the sowing and harvesting schedules of crops
